tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results show good kidney and electrolyte function, and a favorable lipid profile. However, the HbA1c is elevated (6.4%), indicating prediabetes or possible early diabetes, despite a normal fasting glucose. Recommend clinical follow-up for glycemic control and lifestyle modification to reduce diabetes risk. No other significant abnormalities detected.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
